title: OCEAN ONE - Azimut Grande 36M
description:
OCEAN ONE is a spectacular 35-meter Azimut Grande 36M superyacht delivered in 2023 and available for charter throughout the Mediterranean. 

Designed with modern luxury in mind, she accommodates up to 12 guests in five elegant cabins. Guests can enjoy expansive outdoor decks, a beach club, jacuzzi and stylish lounge areas ideal for relaxing at sea. 

Combining cutting-edge design with exceptional comfort, OCEAN ONE offers an outstanding charter experience across the Mediterranean’s most prestigious cruising destinations.
